column2: Transition Month to new strategy. The main goal is to reach 350 leads per month. The highest value of conversion action is Phone Calls (because of highest quality). Those actions on Google are set to only track when 60 seconds of the call have been completed. In theory we'll only count 30% of calls as leads.
